data.content: Requested plan revision. The plan’s main diagnosis is correct, but approval would be premature because it assumes redirected_location() can safely resolve the HEAD response Location header. In the current code, redirected_location() appends a root-relative Location to the full request URL instead of resolving it against the origin, so a redirect such as '/acartine/loom/releases/download/v1.2.3/...' would become malformed. Revise the plan to include correct relative URL resolution for the no-redirect HEAD flow and extend tests to cover both that relative redirect and the second CDN redirect hop.
